Actions.use_case: Create the managed disks that back the restored or exported VM from snapshot data.
Delete disks left behind by a failed export, or remove the original disks during an in-place restore.
Delete the original VM during in-place restore before recreating it from the snapshot.
Power off the source VM before in-place restore so its disks can be detached and replaced.
Provision the restored or exported VM and attach its disks.
Delete network interfaces from the original VM during in-place restore.
Create or attach network interfaces for the restored or exported VM.
Reference Key Vault secrets when deploying a VM that uses Azure Disk Encryption (ADE) keys.
Reinstall VM extensions (such as the Azure Disk Encryption extension) on the restored VM.
Create or update a network security group for the restored or exported VM.
Remove the original network security group during in-place restore.
Power the restored or exported VM on after the restore completes.
Read Key Vault metadata to locate the ADE key associated with the restored VM.
